block_01: Let’s remember only the good of it
block_03: The past 12 months reminded us how important it is to unite for a bigger goal, help each other, and be creative. Thanks to your impact, we will remember 2020 as one of the most interesting and fruitful years in our history.
block_05: Here's to our partnership 🥂 Together, we can make miracles happen.
block_06: Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!
